Water flowing over roadway on SR-247 at mile marker 72.

*** 1 FATAL, 1 INJ *** Corrects previous flash flood report from 1 WSW Lenwood. A car tried to drive through a flooded roadway and was swept off the road on Main St between between Lenwood Rd and Sweeten Ln in Barstow. The father was able to escape and was sent to the hospital with minor injuries. As of 1444 PDT the child was found deceased downstream.

*** 1 INJ *** A car tried to drive through a flooded roadway and was swept off the road on Main St between between Lenwood Rd and Sweeten Ln in Barstow. The father was able to escape and was sent to the hospital with minor injuries. His 2 year old nephew was swept out of the car and is still missing.

The entire length of West Side Rd in Death Valley National Park was closed due to flooding. Time is estimated based on radar.
